cleavage agent: we added 30% sucrose to the PBS and tested different amounts of trypsin per sample.
fragmentation method: fragmentation of the 15 most intense ions by Collision Induced Dissociation
instrument: coupled to an ion trap LTQ-Orbitrap-Velos-Pro mass spectrometer
ionization type: ESI ionization was achieve using a Nano-bore emitters Stainless Steel ID 30 μm
